eula.title: EULA and Notices
eula.subtitle: Explicit agreement before any destructive action.

network.title: Network Topology
network.subtitle: WAN, LAN, and essential network parameters.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Initial settings load for your use case.

users.title: User and SSH
users.subtitle: Admin account, strong password, and SSH.

summary.title: Final Summary
summary.subtitle: Final review before generating the plan and starting installation.

install.title: Installation
install.subtitle: Real-time execution with status and logs.

nav.installRunningHint: Installation in progress. Do not turn off the VM.
nav.eulaHint: Advancing is only allowed via the Next button after checking the agreement.
nav.readyHint: Ready to advance. Quick navigation: Alt + ← / Alt + →

welcome.title: Welcome to Kryonix Installer
welcome.subtitle: The Kryonix Installer will guide you through infrastructure preparation. Set your localization before proceeding.
welcome.infrastructureDetectedDesc: Node {{hostname}} is already running Kryonix. For maintenance, Restore Mode is recommended in the disks step.

storage.title: Partitioning
storage.subtitle: Choose target disk and review the plan before continuing.

automatic.title: Automatic plan
automatic.description: Kryonix will create a recommended layout for this disk.
automatic.noEligible: No eligible disks detected for installation.
automatic.previewDesc: The following layout will be automatically applied to disk

manual.title: Manual partitioning
manual.name: Name
manual.empty: No partitions configured. Click Add Partition.
manual.warningDesc: Real execution of this manual mode depends on current backend installer version.

lvm.title: LVM
lvm.warningDesc: LVM mode is experimental. Use with caution.

raid.title: RAID
raid.requiresTwoDisks: You need at least 2 eligible disks to configure a RAID array.

destructive.title: Operation Security
destructive.description: By proceeding, the partitions of the selected target disks will be permanently erased. Previous data cannot be recovered.
destructive.confirm: I understand that the disks will be formatted.

ssh.title: SSH Access
ssh.desc: Configure public keys for passwordless access.
ssh.instructions: Enter one public key per line. They will be installed in the final system.

account.allowWeakDesc: Not recommended for actual use. Only use in VM, lab, or quick testing. Empty password remains blocked; confirmation still needs to match.

source.title: Configuration Source
source.subtitle: Choose where Kryonix should load the declarative system configuration from.

offline.title: Offline ISO
offline.description: Uses the default configuration embedded in the installation media.

userRepo.title: My GitHub /etc/kryonixos
userRepo.description: Clones your own GitHub repository containing the declarative system configuration.

createRepo.title: Criar novo repo no GitHub
createRepo.description: Crie um repositório pessoal baseado no template KryonixOS.

template.title: KryonixOS Template
template.description: Uses the official template as an initial base. Does not replace the user's personal repository.

eula.title: EULA and Notices
eula.desc: Read carefully and accept to continue
eula.accept: I have read and accept the terms
eula.notice: Kryonix is open-source software, but this installation requires approval of destructive operations on the selected disks.
eula.full_text: This installer will completely overwrite the selected disks. Keep a backup of your data. Maintainers are not liable for any data loss.

validation.STORAGE_DISK_REQUIRED: You must select a disk for installation.
validation.STORAGE_LVM_INCOMPLETE: LVM configuration is incomplete or invalid.
validation.STORAGE_RAID_INCOMPLETE: RAID configuration is incomplete (at least 2 disks required).
validation.NETWORK_PASSWORD_WEAK: Password is too weak. Enable the override if you wish to proceed.
validation.SOURCE_NOT_READY: Online source is not ready or failed.

summary.title: Installation Summary
summary.subtitle: Final review before applying changes.
summary.destructive_desc: By starting the installation, data on the target disk will be permanently lost. Are you sure?

install.title: Installing Kryonix
install.subtitle: Please wait while the system is deployed.

network_page.title: Network Topology
network_page.subtitle: Define how the machine connects to the infrastructure (WAN/LAN).

timezone_page.title: Time Zone and Geolocation
timezone_page.subtitle: Select a region on the map or click a suggestion to set local time.

machine_profile.title: Host Profile
machine_profile.subtitle: Hardware characteristics and roles for the current machine.

sys_features.title: System Features
sys_features.subtitle: Select tools and capabilities at the global (System) level.

user_features.title: User Features
user_features.subtitle: Preferences installed specifically for the logged-in user via Home Manager.

host_selection.title: Identification
host_selection.subtitle: What will be the machine's name (hostname) on the network?

manual.title: Manual partitioning
manual.label: Label
manual.realDiskSizeUnavailable: Real disk size was not detected. It is not safe to proceed with manual partitioning.
manual.allocationExceeded: Disk {{disk}} has {{diskSize}}, but {{allocatedSize}} were allocated. Excess: {{excessSize}}.
manual.swapDoesNotUseMountpoint: Swap does not use a mountpoint.
manual.efiRequired: In UEFI mode, an EFI partition is required.
manual.duplicateLabel: There are duplicate labels on this disk.
manual.empty: No partition configured. Click New partition.
